author: binokyo
title: Music stops inside a playlist
content: Hi. Just wanted to inform you that the music is not playing inside the playlist. The playlist automatically stops even in you are in a continuous play. I have been experiencing it actually even before the update in my iPhone 11 pro device. But in my 6s it worked well, but have the same problem after the update. By the way I am using the pro version because i think pro will solve the problem but it didnt. Justo to give you a history, I started using free evermusic, then purchased inapp pro version and did not fixed the problem. I then uninstalled it and downloaded the pro evermusic version itself but again didnt resolved the issue. Upon browsing and searching the right app, I find Flacbox. It has the same interface of evermusic, which I didnt know if they are if the same creator and the 6s app did the thing of continous play (my 11pro app has the same problem). But now after the update, same problem now arisen in my 6s. I mean I actually paid for the same three apps just to get the best experience. I hope you resolve the issue because I really like your app. Thanks, more power!

title: CAN’T SEE CONTROLS ON LOCKSCREEN
content:

This app is useful if you only have local music files like me. Thanks!

author: thatconcerneddude
title: Needs improvement
content:
Aside from the obvious messy ui. Which is pretty fair given the amount of features.
The BIGGEST problem with this app is the album arrangement. See I appreciate arranging albums alphabetically but having the songs inside the albums also alphabetically arrange? WTH??
How do you suppose albums like linkin park’s meteora be played?. Songs inside the albums Need to be according to track number. Also need an auto import from apple music. See sony’s music center app. They have this “add apps” feature you can use that.
